BamQuery
========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which BamQuery installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using BamQuery, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load BamQuery/1.0-2023-11-3-foss-2023a
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
